name: aznex
description: Team-shared institutional memory for coding agents — repo-scoped, agent-agnostic, MCP-served

scripts.typecheck: bunx tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p packages/worker/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p packages/service/tsconfig.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p packages/frontend/tsconfig.json
